name: yasmine
description: Yasmine voice AI API — automated outbound call confirmations for reseller workflows (MA/DZ/TN/FR).

api_token.title: Yasmine API token
api_token.description: Your Yasmine reseller API key (starts with yk_). Get one at https://docs.yasmine.akidly.com/getting-started

api_endpoint.title: MCP endpoint URL
api_endpoint.description: MCP endpoint URL (default: production). Override for local dev.
